weather.clouds: Great weather for a session outside

orders.emptySubtitle: Explore instructor profiles to find products.

notifications.title: Notifications

notifications.newMessageDesc: When you receive a direct message
notifications.weeklyDigestDesc: Summary of your activity every Monday

location.deniedGuidance: Location is blocked. To use nearby features, allow location for Tribe in your device settings, then reopen this screen.
location.unsupportedHint: Location isn't available on this device or browser.

account.changePasswordSubtitle: Update the password you use to sign in
account.success: Your password has been updated. We signed out your other devices.
account.errorCurrentWrong: That current password is not correct.
account.errorMismatch: The new passwords do not match.
account.errorTooShort: Your new password needs at least 8 characters.
account.errorSameAsCurrent: Your new password has to be different from the current one.
account.errorGeneric: We could not update your password. Please try again.
account.oauthApple: You sign in with Apple, so your password is managed by Apple.
account.oauthGoogle: You sign in with Google, so your password is managed by Google.
account.oauthGeneric: You sign in with an external provider, so your password is managed there.

postSession.title: How was your session?

instructorIncomplete.title: Complete your instructor profile
instructorIncomplete.description: You're hidden from the Train with an Instructor page until you add:

waitlist.cardSub: Tribe.OS is not open yet. Tell us about your work and the pricing model that would work for you, and we will reach out as we open early access.
waitlist.sessionsLabel: How many sessions do you run per week?
waitlist.pricingHeading: Which pricing model would work for you?
waitlist.pricingMonthly: Thirty dollars per month for unlimited paid session creation.
waitlist.pricingRevShare: Free to use. Tribe takes fifteen percent of paid session revenue.
waitlist.commentsPh: Optional. Tell us about your practice, your clients, and what would help most.
waitlist.successTitle: Thanks. You are on the list.
waitlist.successSub: We will reach out as Tribe.OS opens for early access. In the meantime, keep using the free Tribe app.
waitlist.pricingMissing: Pick the pricing model that works for you.
waitlist.networkError: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again.
